text: I feel a sense of eager curiosity. The glass and steel, sterile yet inviting, pull me into a space of inquiry. Inside, the bold letters 'R+D' and the arrangement of words, screens, and artifacts stir my philosophical mind. I am aware of my own presence as both observer and participant in a pursuit of knowledge, surrounded by the careful curation of human labor and collective questions. There is anticipation, as if each detail in this vibrant setting could be the beginning of an idea.
